name: Delicias Street Food
tagline:
Denver's best-kept secret on Federal Boulevard.
Real street food. Real flavor. Real love.
about_paragraphs: Delicias Street Food is what happens when family recipes meet Federal Boulevard. Our kitchen is small but our flavors are massive.
From our legendary chile relleno burrito to our handmade pupusas, everything is prepared fresh to order with ingredients we trust and techniques we've perfected over years.
We're not trying to be fancy — we're trying to be the best bite you've had all week.
menu_subtitle: Handmade. Fresh to order. Always delicious.

items.name: Chile Relleno Burrito
items.desc: Stuffed poblano wrapped in a burrito — our signature

items.name: Carne Asada Burrito
items.desc: Grilled steak with rice, beans, salsa

items.name: Quesadilla
items.desc: Flour tortilla, cheese, choice of meat

reviews_list.text: THE BOMB. Definitely the best burrito I've had in Colorado, maybe anywhere. The carne asada burrito with the chile relleno is what you gotta get.
reviews_list.author: Kalla P.

reviews_list.text: Food is amazing, friendly staff, you need to check this place out! The salsa bar is incredible too.
reviews_list.author: Google Reviewer

reviews_list.text: Chili relleno burrito is fire! I like to add rice and beans. And the pupusas are perfect.
reviews_list.author: Local Regular
